items.title: Stage + commit produces a real commit
items.precondition: A git repo with a configured user.name/email.
items.expected: A commit appears with the message; nothing-staged → GIT_NOTHING_TO_COMMIT; empty message → GIT_COMMIT_EMPTY_MESSAGE.
items.evidence: GitService.test.ts: 'stages a new file and commits it', 'rejects committing with nothing staged', 'rejects an empty commit message' (vitest, 11 passed).

items.title: Create + switch branches; injection rejected
items.expected: Valid name creates+switches; invalid name → GIT_BRANCH_INVALID; duplicate → GIT_BRANCH_EXISTS.
items.evidence: GitService.test.ts: 'creates and switches to a valid branch', 'rejects an invalid branch name', 'rejects a duplicate branch name'.

items.title: Push sets upstream on first push, never forces
items.precondition: A repo with an origin remote.
items.expected: New branch is pushed with upstream set; remote shows the branch.
items.evidence: GitService.test.ts: 'pushes a new branch by setting upstream' (against a bare origin).

items.title: Merge to main merges + pushes; conflict aborts cleanly
items.precondition: A repo with main + a feature branch.
steps: 1. POST /api/git/merge-main { projectId } on a clean branch.
items.expected: Clean branch merges into main and pushes; conflict → GIT_MERGE_CONFLICT and the tree is left clean on the source branch (not half-merged).
items.evidence: GitService.test.ts: 'merges a clean branch into main and pushes', 'aborts and stays clean on a merge conflict', 'refuses to merge when already on main'.

items.title: Clicking a changed file shows its HEAD-vs-working diff
items.precondition: App running; a project with working-tree changes; on the REPO tab.
steps: 2. Click a changed file in the left rail.
items.expected: A side-by-side Monaco diff (HEAD vs working) renders; new files show empty left, deleted files empty right.
items.evidence: DiffViewer typechecks + builds; visual diff needs the running app.

items.title: REPO commit/branch/push/merge flow from the UI
items.precondition: App running on REPO; an origin remote configured for credential reuse.
items.expected: Each action succeeds with a toast; push/merge prompt a confirm dialog first; errors surface via toast.
items.evidence: Backend ops proven by T1–T4; UI wiring typechecks + builds; end-to-end click-through needs the running app + a remote.

items.title: Build + typecheck pass
items.evidence: Backend + frontend tsc EXIT=0; frontend build OK; full suite 63 passed.
